prompt: Create a seven-panel executive carousel for 'Coherence Beats Compliance'. Panels: 1 title; 2 visible process can mimic alignment; 3 compliance versus coherence; 4 process cannot replace sensemaking; 5 coherence as a system property; 6 contradictions that expose incoherence; 7 operating principle: ask whether the system makes enough sense to move. Use clean comparisons and restrained typography.
proof_boundaries: Do not imply process or compliance is inherently useless.
Do not include unsupported transformation statistics.
Do not depict coherence as universal agreement.
